flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Angelina College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Angelina College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7k → 2.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Angelina College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.9k → $6.5k).
